title: AustraliaCraft
description: Horror modpack simulating the everday life of Australian people.
body:
This is a horror modpack with some silly elements sprinkled in. It is mostly centered around Arthropod Phobia, although it also features some other horror mods (no dwellers) and graphics/QOL. It was originally made to play with friends on a server, but I decided to publish it since it doesn't contain any mods found outside of Modrinth.

There is a bit of joke content added, which you'll notice pretty early on in your playthrough. If it gets too annoying, you can just disable it.
